channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: HoW iS eVerYonE dOinG this? — 57 replies — 109.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
HoW iS eVerYonE dOinG this?

Open thread • Replies: 57 • Updated: 2026-04-13 13:50 UTC

OP

I love watching normie carhag/carfag compilations where Normies complain about how everything is too expensive.

I live on ~24k a year in a HCOL city making $26/hr
>$820 rent utilities included
>free transportation (fare fags aren’t checking train during my commute hours)
>$300/mo groceries (steak and potatoes mostly)
>$60/mo unlimited data
>$15/mo rent insurance
>$30 dental insurance *shrugs*

I regularly spend $8 on coffee, $15 on cigs, $30 dollars on pizza, and I STILL usually dump minimum $1500 a month into my brokerage account. Next month my credit limit will go from 12k>24k when I open another chase CC. I have 6 months expenses in a savings account and the equivalent in dry powder in my brokerage.

Being completely unstressed/concerned about money and whipping out my girthy 12k CL sapphire preferred card on cutie coffee sluts 4 times a week to order my $9 dollar 24oz drum of double chocolate mocha and then ripping a Newport 100 on a comfy bench while i enjoy my coffee is all the pleasure I need in this world

Early replies (first 3)

62107190
It's funny because I'm supposed to be an Europoor but my life standars is better than 99% of Americans lmfao.

I've never heard a single European complaining about debt. But you meet one of those Amerimutts that come to our continent for tourism or to teach English, and 5 minutes into the conversation they will start telling how how much in debt they are. BAFFLING.

62107202
>>62107169
>HCOL city
>$820 rent utilities included
and then your dad stopped molesting you and the out of body disassociation cope ended.

62107317
>>62107169
>>62107190
I'm American. Envious, ungrateful, whiny, bitchy Americans are an embarrassment. It's really not hard to live here at all. The problem is almost every retard that lives here thinks you should be able to afford a 2,300 sqft house on 1 acre of land, while having a new Toyota Camry in the driveway and enough in savings to go on 2 - 3 week-long vacations a year after putting 15% into an investment account, all on a McDonald's wage, or a basic-bitch corporate cubicle job, while only working 30 hours a week (yes, even 40 hours is too much work for Americans now).

Most people live WAY above their means. It's just a mixture of low-IQ combined with a set of personality traits that make them susceptible to short-term thinking and hedonism. Then they beg for free-gibs from the government while producing less material goods and services. It doesn't take a rocket scientist to figure out where this leads to.

I feel zero pity or sympathy for any of these people. Fuck them and their retarded choices.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62107985
>>62107937
He might have credit card debt and only pays the minimums. For his sake, I hope I'm wrong.

62108002
>>62107979
>>62107985
It's over for him, I didn't calculate right and didn't include his weekly coffees, he has 34,500 in expenses here

62108004
Worst bait I've seen all year yet retards are falling for it

62108006
>>62107202
Your imagination is a reflection of your twisted mind

62108007
>>62108004
Is it? There's a lot more people with credit card debt now. Many only think they need to pay the minimum amount.

62108009
>>62107169
It's really not that hard. I make about $25k a year. Have 800+ credit score, get free flights from credit card sign up bonuses and spend like 6 months out of year on vacation.

62108014
I don't know how people are doing it, I earn above minimum wage as a europoor and I couldn't afford to live by myself so never left my parents.
If I was to live alone, of my salary:
70% would be rent/mortgage.
20% on food and transport
30% on local taxes
40% on bills you can't avoid (electricity, water, gas, etc)
Yes, the basics would be way above my entire salary each month.
This would be to just live in a prison cell sized place and never have any entertainment or any microscopic fragment of joy in life.

62108021
>>62108014
Roommates
I only make $1500 a month when I was in grad school.

62108023
>>62107169
Hey buddy, you are poorfagging. Not a good look.

62108025
>>62108014
Living with your parents while working can be a powerful weapon. You should be using all that money you would waste on rent, on investing. If you do that, you will move ahead of the rest of the cattle and pretty fast.

Of course, if you use that money to buy anime figures or go and have beers with your friends, that is another question.

62108041
>>62108025
>This

62108050
>>62107169
These people always look so trashy. Always the same open-mouthed expression, the ugly trashy tattoos, the car that probably smells bad

62108053
>>62108006
suck my dick from the back, fag nigger

62108081
>>62107169

How the fuck do you only spend $300 a month on steak

62108103
>>62108081
It's a 1pbtid demoralization thread

62108106
>>62108081
Depends on the type. Ribeye is around 30 dollars, Sirloin is around 17 dollars, and sizzle steak is around 12 dollars.

62108113
>>62108103
I thought it was a credit card debt thread
>whipping out my girthy 12k CL sapphire preferred card

62108121
>>62107169
One way I save some money eating out with people while visiting a city is putting the bill on my card and having the others pay for the tax and tip in their splits.

62108129
>>62107387
>>larping zoomers who are either living at home or living in a total shit hole that’s worse than Soviet-Era commieblocks.
Yet they have enough money to pay for an expensive smartphone and data plan.

62108201
>>62108129
Debt, specifically credit card debt. Everybody (all age groups) want to look wealthy instead of having money to "keep up".

62108666
>>62108025
>Don’t have friends or drink the occasional beer
>Live like an incel hermit in your 20s so you can be slightly more successful in your 40s (maybe)
>Do not develop your social skills even though all high-paying jobs require charisma and nepotism
>Escape the matrix
Yeah man, you got it all figured out. Don’t Google why fraternity bros earn more money over the course of their lifetime than the average college graduate.

62108694
>>62108129
>Yet they have enough money to pay for an expensive smartphone and data plan.
It’s not 2012 anymore boomer. Unlimited talk/text/data is the basic plan, and you save maybe 5 dollars going for anything less. Also, most people are running around with 3 year old iPhones and only upgrade when they get the (((free upgrade))) that locks them into the plan they were gonna continue paying for anyways.

The iPhone hasn’t gotten better in 8 years. Nobody cares about upgrading unless they’re just ready to switch to USB-C.

62108705
>>62108666
Satanic digits

62108799
>>62108666
> Don’t Google why fraternity bros earn more money over the course of their lifetime than the average college graduate.
10% of Americans have 1m.
2.5% have 1m when you exclude a house.

62108879
>>62107202
I live in la jolla and i guess its considered a hcol city. Rent is $4k/month utilities are $200 electric is about $220

62108981
>>62107169
>newport 100
>mocha homosexual drink
You lost a game you didn’t even realize you were playing. Congrats

62110498
>>62108129
A smartphone and unlimited data is less than 1k a year, if you get a new phone every fucking year

Lead brained boomer.

62110818
>>62107317
Basically me although a lot of it is fueled by my wife and children. Some of it is that I’m a spoiled entitled little bitch too though. I have about 30k in credit card debt but I have 70k in crypto which used to be mid six figures so I’m hoping we get back somewhere close to that level before I sell to pay the credit cards off. Obviously it’s a huge gamble at this point and the lower we go the harder it is to continue holding.

62110913
>>62107317
>Americans expect to live like their parents/grandparents and are mad that the world’s greatest economy was stolen from them.
Seems pretty reasonable, actually

62110976
>>62107190
Yeah well the Jews had to go somewhere after WWII. I guess it's only fair they brought their tikkun olam to flood the cities with violent criminals and usurious debts to the U.S. The U.S. is almost fully healed i.e. an Africanized warzone. It's a painful process, but Europe is coming along great.

item.title: someone knows something (most likely TACO related) — 21 replies — 79.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
someone knows something (most likely TACO related)

Open thread • Replies: 21 • Updated: 2026-04-13 14:05 UTC

OP

someone knows something
(most likely TACO related)

Early replies (first 3)

62109901
>negative 2M PNL

62109915
>>62109884
Im retarded and new to biz, can you explain it to me a little bit simpler please?

62109919
>>62109915
Just wait for taco tuesday and that faggot can buy all the dildos and boyfriends he wants

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62109922
>>62109901
it's not closed yet
we shall see

62109927
>>62109884
they know China needs oil and will tell Iran to stop

62109928
>>62109919
>TACO Tuesday
I think he'll move it to Wednesday.

62109931
>>62109884
everyone knows something

62109935
>>62109927
Iran can deliver oil to china and russia via the north passage

62109940
>>62109935
its the other 100 boats a day china needs to get the price back down

62109942
>china will sit around and let iran fuck its entire economy
no one believes that

62110209
>>62109884
World peace intensifies(according to trump)

62110216
>>62109884
That was me. Not an insider though, it's just obvious Trump will delay the blockade.

62110243
They are going to keep shorting and manipulating prices down even as this accelerates shortages and destroys the global economy.

62110251
>>62110243
Thats the wef plan.

62110253
Blockade TACO

62110288
>>62109884
I hope this leveragetard get liquidated desu.

62110738
>>62109915
someone bet a lot of money that the price of oil is going down

62110843
>>62109931
How can this work if the supply of oil decreases at the same time? Won't this cause shortages?

62110914
>>62109884
Gents this is the liberal brain at max potential. TACO would make the price go up. Not down. Yet this idiot it LITERALLY saying the opposite.

His first thought was entirely wrong and he still followed through. Kill all liberals.

62110993
>>62109884
he was right lol

62111071
>>62110843
the strait will reopen obviously

item.title: What are the financial implications of every job in filmmaking being completely eradicated >dude it's only like 99% perf… — 19 replies — 76.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
What are the financial implications of every job in filmmaking being completely eradicated >dude it's only like 99% perf…

Open thread • Replies: 19 • Updated: 2026-04-13 14:15 UTC

OP

What are the financial implications of every job in filmmaking being completely eradicated

https://youtu.be/-Rzl7nUdEs4

>dude it's only like 99% perfect

Okay, see you in ONE YEAR

Early replies (first 3)

62108853
>>62108820
anti-Semitic

62108877
>>62108820
Im hoping we get a future where indie/small team devs have AI enabling them to compete with large studios in media.

Especially hoping when VR tech catches up it is created by an ocean of smaller devs. A more cynical me says that things will not be allowed to disrupt the industry

62108878
This is antisemitic

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62108985
>>62108877
That's pretty much exactly what this video is

62109051
>>62108820
Oy vey.

62109061
>>62108820
i really like their work. ai isnt quite there yet, good enough to tell a story though. there are lots of visual inconsistencies if you are looking for them, and the lip syncing is bad. if you have messed around with ai you'll understand the editing choice they have to make for these videos. lots of compromises. you are pretty much stuck only having people walking around and close ups of faces for your narrative. you wouldnt be able to do a space marine battle or something. and obviously a skilled writer and editor and sound mixer worked on this project, not something that a jeet could make

62109656
>>62108820
I feel fucking nothing when I watch this. Even with some of the newer hollywood films I at least feel disgust. This is gonna be used for weird fetish shit thats about it. Porn is probably long term over. but not cinema. Theres a reason they have to release this shit on youtube. No one is paying to see this.

62109713
>>62108820
looks like all the Love, Death & Robots animator types are going out of business kek

62109720
>>62109656
cope

62109731
>>62108820
Movies are about telling stories. A shitskin can have the most sophisticated robotic monkey at his command, but if he doesn't know how to tell a good story, compose his shots, edit, then it's garbage. This whole video is a disjointed mess, cutting to a new character mid conversation, mid scene, without introducing them. AIslop is AIslop because the people using it only know how to make slop.

62109736
>>62109731
This whole video reads like a 7 year old going "and then he did this thing and then he did this thing and then there was a spaceship and then there was a rat man, oh look a snail, now there cool guy is here he's so cool". Zero sense of how to write a story.

62109968
>>62108820
it couldnt happen to better people (hollywood)

62109979
>>62109968
yeah it's hard to feel bad for hollywood getting crushed by AI when you have to think back 10+ years for the last even halfway decent movie or tv show

62109986
>>62108820
Gossip Goblin is great.

62110120
>>62109061
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=68CYQ7TwRjA
https://www.youtube.com/shorts/zvvcT9uapYk

Getting there

62110128
>>62109736
sadly, we're stuck between tasteless ai retards spamming garbage and tasteless slop producers churning out capeshit. the future of media is bleak

62110137
>>62108820
Kek what the fuck is this shit? Is it completely made by AI?

62110165
>>62108820
That's really, really good news. I do hope it gets that far. Hollyshit will still spew their constant nigshit propaganda but at least the won't be paying 70 IQ tards millions to do it. I approve.

62111124
>>62108820
The world economy did just fine back when Hollywood was just an empty valley, it'll do just fine without it.

item.title: Chainlink: Now that WLFI has been officially — 17 replies — 68.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Chainlink: Now that WLFI has been officially

Open thread • Replies: 17 • Updated: 2026-04-13 14:18 UTC

OP

exposed, do you think Chainlink regrets hyping up their partnership?

Early replies (first 3)

62108470
part 2

62108481
3 of 3

had to post the whole thing for you guys as i know many of you aren't very good with tech


does anyone remember when your god posted about how trump was the saylor of chainlink lmao i need to find that post

man talk about grim!

62108538
“lol” said the scorpion, “lmao even”

That said, this shit is brazen even for the most corrupt vermin to have ever set foot in DC.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62108549
you can't make up material this good

it's almost as if the cult craves being humiliated
it's like they get a rush from it. each time upping the stakes a little higher

that kind of behavior reminds me of a certain type of person. hmmm i can't quite place the term...

62108566
AHAHAHAHAHAHAHAAHAHAHAHHAHAAHAHAHAH

62109007
>>62108566
https://www.congress.gov/bill/119th-congress/house-bill/3633/text

I will accept the lesser evil of a President who is shilling a meme coin if it means the government is proactive in supporting the crypto industry as a whole. The previous administration was out to destroy crypto and the SEC charges were for that purpose, not for ensuring fairness. I understand his point about the corruption and deals made, but I will accept this pill to swallow, given no other alternatives.

62109011
>62108461
>62108470
>62108481
>62108549
>62108566
>hurrr chainlink = wlfi now
Pic related is who makes this twitter screencrap spam btw. An actual sissy gooner obsessed with watching niggers fuck women he likes

62109018
>>62109011
yikes

62110061
>>62108549
>you can't make up material this good
This

62110075
I've lost a lot of respect for chainlink, and crypto in general.

62110094
this literally has nothing to do with chainlink

62110190
>>62110094
on a similar note, chainlink has nothing to do with banks

62110236
>>62108461
>I am an ambassador at World Liberty Financial
>our memecoin launched 3 days before the inauguration

World Liberty Financial had literally nothing to do with the Trump memecoin.
The fuck is this slop.

62110388
>>62108549
>it's almost as if the cult craves being humiliated
That would make sense when you consider their origin

HOLY SHIT

By sheer chance I happened to be watching Sunny today, "The gang finds a dumpster baby", and recognised one of the frames Asslarper used (pic related).

In this episode, Dennis (AB's avatar) convinces an activist to CHAINLINK himself to a tree, then LITERALLY cuckolds him.

>A SINGULAR TREE
>THE cuckOLDS OF CRYPTO!

Now do you believe me?

Inverse Assblaster; what did he tell you was useless?

62110571
Lol adem the bbc loving cuck just sitting here replying to himself now
>>62110061
>>62110388

62111128
>duuuuuuude we were in the white house

grim

62111149
>>62109018
this guy got rattled so hard he puts this pic in every single link thread to deal with the massive hit to his ego caused by missing the bullrun

>>62109011
this guys ego got so destroyed he resorted to tracking a random dude beating off


bahhaahahahahahahahahahha

you dudes need to take the L a little better than that

item.title: MONDAY OIL — 20 replies — 45.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
MONDAY OIL

Open thread • Replies: 20 • Updated: 2026-04-13 13:54 UTC

OP

Give me one reason not to go all in with 100x leverage.
Literal free money has never been more certain

Early replies (first 3)

62106393
you have to expect at least one jewish trick from trump / bessent that will dump it back down first. I would enter after that happens.

62106406
>>62106388
>by the time you make it back after being drafted (IF you make it back) that shit will be back down to earth
Amritard problems, bruh

62106425
>>62106388
Its on binance, wont moon.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62106434
>Axios will publish a propoganda article about making peace
>Trump will post a Truth talking about being close to a deal.
>Oil will be down 2-3%
JUST

62106436
>>62106434
this is what it will be

62106437
>>62106388
It's too late you should have invested on friday

62106497
>>62106434
And bombs will still fly left and right in the meantime.

62106523
>>62106388
If you’re so certain this thread wouldn’t be necessary

62106534
>>62106406
>Muh draft
Are you 12? Is this your first time seeing a conflict involving America?

62106657
>>62106388
It’s already priced in faggot. You think you’re faster than the algos? By the time you hit the buy button on Monday, all the profitable trades will have already been made and you will make $0

62106718
>>62106534
most people on this website are retarded. i should stop coming here.

62106843
>>62106388
Taco Tuesday is coming.

62106942
Trump will probably taco out of this blockade, but lets see. If not we're going to the fuckin moon

62107030
>>62106843
at this point the taco is Bearish too (ground invasion)

62107176
>>62106534
This is your first time seeing America starting a conflict with a real country

62107398
I am going to kidnap Brent Crude

62107416
>>62106388
You really need to understand the simple fact that if you put yourself in a position of being free liquidity, someone is going to liquidate you.

62107578
>>62106388
>oil MUST go up
Futures will be heavily manipulated to prevent the goyim from making money. Longs will be liquidated prior to Monday open.

62110923
>>62106434
First one on schedule. Barak Ravid at it again

https://x.com/BarakRavid/status/2043661048176095346

62111007
NY POST ARTICLE FUD
DOWN 2% BABY

item.title: How will he TACO at 8am today? — 9 replies — 36.0/hr
item.content:encoded:

Open thread • Replies: 9 • Updated: 2026-04-13 14:16 UTC

OP

Early replies (first 3)

62110726
>>62110285
no more tacos
I'm full

62110867
I don't get this meme. Is he doing too much or too little? He just missiled two of their leaders and is refusing to leave the area unless they agree to some kind of terms. One half of lefties are calling him murderous and the other are saying he's a "TACO" but if he was a taco why would we even be here?

62110999
>>62110285
TACO update?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62111011
>>62110867
You’re trying to make sense out of tranny palestinian babble, that’s the problem

62111017
I was wrong guys. He got his jewish friends in the media to post fake articles to manipultate the stock market instead.

Thanks Barak Ravid!

62111106
>>62110285
Why should he TACO? Things are going great for the US.

62111109

Literally donated money to his 2016 campaign.

FUCK THIS ORANGE NIGGER

62111119

62111131

item.title: Fudders... — 19 replies — 12.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
Fudders...

Open thread • Replies: 19 • Updated: 2026-04-13 12:48 UTC

OP

Why is everyone acting like crypto is dead? This board really is full of trolls and retards. Binanace doubled the amount of RWAs on chain this past year. LINK is working with the government. Blockchain clearly is useful tech. Not saying we're at the very bottom or that 99% of coins will survive the future, but c'mon man. What is the actual case to not buy rn

Early replies (first 3)

62105213
>>62105187
Are you retarded? The last time crypto as a market performed better than equities was in 2020.

62105238
>>62105187
blockchain useful tech? tell me what you used blockchain for this week.

62105868
>>62105213
Not really sure what this guy is on about. Certain crypto currencies have outperformed equities multiples times since 2020, just google chud.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62105875
>>62105213
Like not even sure what "as a market" means or why it would be a good metric. If you are a retard and buy memecoins today, no shit you wont make money. Not advocating for every coin ever btw, most are shit.

62105900
>>62105238
Finance

62105923
>>62105187
crypto isnt dead. its just a worse investment compared to chip stocks the last 3 years and going forward.

btc wont 20x again. you missed the boat.

62105928
>>62105187
I've been hearing the same hopium for years

62105982
>>62105187
>Why is everyone acting like crypto is dead?
cuz price? all crypto is doing these days is crabbing and dumping

62106018
>>62105187
It'll be cheaper to buy in at the bottom in October. Oil crisis is gonna rock is all summer long and we won't start sideways accumulation gathering out of it til nov/Oct. Bullrun in 2029, it'll be a good one. Diamond hands will be gloating in here. Ton of people are probably gonna get shaken off the ride over the next few months.

62106024
>>62105238
distributed networks will be useful in the near future
they will make computing cheaper and faster

62106139
>>62106024
The future is NOW nig, its 2026. Crypto has been out for 36 years and its still useless.

62106173
>>62106139
People don't believe the future is now with AI either. But history will bury you, fag.

62106480
>>62105187
Board is half infested with jeets shilling kas/xno/jas/other streetcoins
Other half is either /leftypol/ retards (redundant) or glowies (also redundant because leftists are always statist stooges) that spam off topic fud and well poisoning threads that will inevitably stay up longer than discussions that are relevant or interesting (maybe one a week at this point).
Point is: leftists hate crypto because it could free people from statism, and jeets hate crypto, but love the shitcoin scam casino. Both are here to expressly demoralize and steal your money, so the board feels like shit, because it is shit

62107655
>>62106480
im a rightist who hates crypto tho

62108389
>>62106480
I really don't understand framing this as a partisan issue (leftists oppose big govt traditionaly so why would they dislike decentralized currency as well?). Imo the reason crypto hasn't blown up further is because retail is in but tradfi/bankers see crypto and defi as a competitor, or at least something that would shake things up too much. Lots of lobbying on both sides surely.

62108404
>>62108389
Sorry, I make a correction to my previous statement. Leftists are probably pro big government. Still I dont think pressure comes from the left. The American government is right wing currently but doesn't give a shit about passing the clarity act or really much about crypto currently.

62108860
>>62105238
/thread
the only thing it's good for is buying illegal shit

62109029
>>62105187
this board has always been populated by psychopaths. after the october flash crash they either suicided or doubled down on their idiocy after losing all their money

god what a day that was. this board was a ghost town. so many faggots got rekt hard, ill cherish that day forever

62110725
>>62105238

item.title: Polkadot - First halving — 306 replies — 296.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
Polkadot - First halving

Open thread • Replies: 306 • Updated: 2026-04-13 13:19 UTC

OP

https://polkadothalving.com/ 10 more days. https://www.parity.io/blog/refining-polkadots-economic-architecture-issuance-DOT-DAP-and-network-adjustments
https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2028482336463945765
"
Polkadot’s economic upgrade begins rolling out in 10 days.

Enhanced tokenomics increases DOT scarcity and introduces new governance and staking mechanisms.

▸ DOT supply capped at 2.1B
▸ Emissions cut 53.6%
▸ Unbonding from 28 days to 24-48 hours
"

Early replies (first 3)

61933757
Guys?

61933779
>>61932834
10000$ @ 6.5
i dont sell my dotty

61936705
Guys?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62094396
>>62094207
>See you at the mosque on Sunday
Friday, kaffir!

62094480
>>62094396
>Friday, kaffir!
Ah yes Arjun hajji, I have forgotten. Of course! Praise Allah, the al-ilah, all-powerful God. We are the chosen people. Everyone else is a goy. We shall rule the world with our DOTs, the crypto of Islam. Praise be Allah Christ Vishnu.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62094791
>>62089608
>>62093506
>>62094480

Stop larping as an Indian

62095346
>>62094791
Good job Panjali. Bump the thread you I can bump it off your comment. Our small village of Mumbai shall eat for a year of this thread alone.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62097729
Dear Mumbai warriors,

I hope you slurped the bottom. I hope you inhaled the smell for it is time. It is time to go back to where we belong. To 55$ and beyond. Mumbai warriors, it is OUR TIME.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62097956
bump for polkacurry

62098919
>>62097956
Yes, my fren Rohit. We, the Mumbai Warriors, will eat the best PolkaCurry there is. We shall express gratefulness to our lord Wood while we eat with SPOONS I tell you my friend. The time where we ate with our bare hands is over Rohit. We shall consume our PolkaCurry with a metal SPOON Rohit. Today, we embark into the bright new future that was laid out thanks to our spiritual leader Lord Wood. Vishnu of the mindchain bless him. Oh Rohit, how far we have come. The Mumbai warriors shall bring the whole of Mumbai, the city of DOT, into a bright future. Soon the period of enlightenment begins. Mumbai warriors, if you can hear me, give me your best BATTLE SHOUT !!!

Shouts: "TOGETHER WE STAND UNITED AS PROUD MAN OF THE MIND CHAIN. RISE MY BRETHREN. RISE MY WARRIORS. TAKE UP YOUR ARMS AND LET'S FIGHT FOR OUT GLORIOUS LORD WOOD. FOR MUMBAI, THE CITY OF DOT AAAAAAAAAAA"

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62099150
>>62097729
Aren't you shorting DOT?

62099687
>>62099150
PSSSTTT, Panjali. Do I look like a Nintendo to you? Stop playing me and telling them the plan. Panjali, shut your mouth or no PolkaCurry for you young Vishnu mind. Do you want the Mumbai warriors to eat with metal spoons or with their hands? Do you want an age of enlightenment? If yes, then give us your best battle shout my young Vishnu warrior. Scream so hard that Gavin Wood, our spiritual leader, will hear your voice a top mount Hyjal.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62100207
>>62099687
based street shitting dot preacher

62101334
>>62100207
Thank you. I try my best to be the best street shitter DOT preacher. We get paid really good and therefore we eat with metal spoons and not with our hands.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62102768
Remember my young Vishnus of the mindchain. THIS YEAR NOMT + JAM go live on DOT (and other major upgrades). With that DOT will position itself to be about 10 years ahead of the competition. The bull market bottom has probably already been reached. Even if we go lower it won't be for more than like 10%. Maybe we'll get a black swan event mid summer, maybe we won't. The next cycle is probably going to be THE SUPER CYCLE, THE GOLDEN BULL RUN. I would position myself in a project that has some utility like DOT. The meme coin bullshitery is OVER. People are going to go back to their roots. There is no more stupidity left in the market. If you guys can't understand that then so help you Vishnu.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62102845
Just realized this thread has been up for more than a month.

62102949
>>62102845
Yes, I've been saying that I'm paid by Gavin Wood directly and that we, the Mumbai warrirors, are eating with metal spoons instead of our hands because of it!

>>62068446
>>62071796
>>62071796
>>62079572

The Mumbai warriors are winning and we're entering a time of enlightenment in Mumbai because of it. PolkaCurry for everyone. Join us

62103152
My Mumbai warriors, my young Vishnus of the mind chain. Remember. This is THE bull run. I hope you are stacking. For this bull run will decide the winners from the losers. This is the GOLDEN bull run everyone has been talking about. This is IT. The decisive moment where the projects that will become the new Nvidia, Amazon, Google. Choose wisely my young Mumbai warriors for reality is not what it seems. If a coin has no utility. If the network can't handle millions of TPS at a cheap cost then there is no point in investing into it. DOT has everything anyone would think of as an important feature to have and soon, this year, JAM and NOMT and other major upgrades will hit. It'll revolutionize what the sector STANDARD is. Soon my brethren we will be called THE CHAIN. We will be a major focal point, a nexus if you will, for the whole Web3 world. We will be the center and the bridge for every other chain. Enlightenment is upon us my Mumbai warriors. Rise my brethren, rise into a new dawn of magic.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62103167
Kafir token!

62104249
100$ END OF BULL RUN MY YOUNG VISHNU MIND CHAIN MUMBAI BRETHREN WARRIORS.

62104293
>>62103152
>>62104249

Not indian.

62105141
>>62104293
Good one Panjali. You will get many DOTs once we meet at the shrine of Gavin, in Mumbai city, the city of DOT, the city of the Mumbai warriors. Yes Panjali, we shall eat with METAL spoons. We shall consume our PolkaCurry with pride and dignity. We won't eat with our hands no more. It is done. We have evolved, we have become enlightened, we are one with existence.

62107462
100$ end of bull run

62107808
>>62107462
75$
For me IMHO.

62109094
>>62107808
Very good my good sar Mumbai warrior sar. Yes yes. We shall eat with metal spoons once we reach the nirvana of 75$

Not sure if you guys noticed. https://staking.polkadot.cloud/#/overview - The APY is 5.33% and 53.14% of the supply is staked. Therefore the inflation = 5.33 * 0.5314 = 2.832362%. So the inflation is basically 2.83% now and I think the 5.33% is the AVERAGE of the last month therefore we still have like 1 or 3 more days until a full month will pass since the 1st halving. Not sure if the halving was on the 13th or the 15th. I know they said PI day and at the same time I'm not 100% if the actual drop happened on PI day... So yea. But what I'm saying is that the inflation dropped from like 8-10% to now 2.8%.

62109790
My good sars, the bottom is in. I hope you are staking for we are going to nirvana (75$) and beyond (100$). We feed the whole village of Mumbai. The thread has been alive for 40 whole days. Let's see if we can get it to 60 days. If we do then the Mumbai wairriors will eat for generations to come.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62110141
>>62110117
>>62109790
Was this you my Mumbai brother?

62110170
>>62110117
not DOT, but yet another bridge exploit in the DOT eco

62110237
Jesuschrist, how can you all keep talking about this dead project? Just get over it. Even linkies have given up

62110621
>>62110117
What in the hell?

62110845
>>62110117
LOL
LMAO even

item.title: the highest state of being is NEETing and getting pussy — 56 replies — 174.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
the highest state of being is NEETing and getting pussy

Open thread • Replies: 56 • Updated: 2026-04-13 14:02 UTC

OP

followed closely by NEETS that don't get pussy

then wfh chads or people who genuinely love their job

it's never a good deal to have a job, work 40 hours a week in something you despise, having to be on time, bowing to your boss, dealing with shitty customers and clients, even if it gives you the money to live on your own and maybe get laid or have a gf, the humilliation is not worth it, the money doesn't fix the daily defeats that working for a wage deals to your spirit.

and then of course the lowest state of being is to wage 40 hours a week and still being a virgin, I pray for these people, they are living in hell.

I went from waging in IT and getting pussy to not waging and going back to my parents house, I haven't gotten laid in a year and I still prefer this deal over having to be on the office on time, my soul is regenerating from the damage it suffered from having a job.

Early replies (first 3)

62102105
>>62102068
Wtf is “get pussy?” Like a relationship aka emotional investment even if just a very casual friend? Or actual gf which is even more emotional investment?

62102115
>>62102105
getting pussy is the act of inserting your penis in a pussy, there are many methods to do this, but the act is the same.

62102119
>>62102068
> my soul is regenerating from the damage it suffered from having a job.
As someone who did the whole school, college and work thing, lemme tell you something. It takes about 3 years for you to feel normal. It took me about 3 years after retirement to feel like my teenager self again.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62102806
>>62102599
it's over, I could not go on living in your situation, god bless you.

>>62102628
that is why it's the highest state

like a bodybuilder, packing muscle (sex) while shredding fat (work)

62102868
>>62102400
cope, the neet pays more with his time

62102892
>>62102806
>it's over, I could not go on living in your situation, god bless you.

Thank you, but the only reason I haven't kms is because I think there's a 1% chance I will burn in Hell if I do. I'm trapped in this life until I die.

62102908
>>62102868
nigga money is time if you aren't born with it, and texting a bitch is way less effort than whatever you do to eran your money.

you should see what the average dude spends directly or indirectly on women, it's tragic.

>>62102892
hell is a psyop to keep niggas working

62102943
>>62102068
>the highest state of being is NEETing and getting pussy
Highest state is being independently financially secure through a mysterious source of income. This includes having your own home.

>then wfh chads or people who genuinely love their job
All mid. They love it, but could they financially afford to really STOP doing it at any moment? Most would say no. That might be love, but it's also necessity.

And let's not even get started on where sex havers would really be ranked (pig disgusting baka).

62103102
>>62102908
>hell is a psyop to keep niggas working

That's brutal

62103109
>>62102068
>ur in hell if u have to work & no muh dick
again what the hell is this board?

62103488
>>62102068
Based thread wagies seething at it.

62103497
>>62102190
i dont understand how men end up begging for sex after months or years of relationship

i am the one who dont want to have sex with my gf after months or years of relationship

like why would i want to fuck the same pussy constantly it s so fucking boring

i only have sex with my gf when she is ovulating and i found out that she was lying about her ovulation period to get more sex from me so i told her to get ovulation tests instead of believing her ovulation calendar

if she is not pregnant before 2027 i dump her btw

62103506
>>62102631
are you me?

since i got laid off one month ago i shit massive logs

62103518
>>62102892
Is there a reason you can't move away from the drug dealer at least?

62103520
>>62102068
rich neet with pussy on demand is literally peak existence
unironically the modern equivalent of royalty

62105539
>>62103506
being a big shitter is shit if you are working, I need my me time to shit, relax my body and mind, then sit on the toilet for 45 minutes and push the little nigger out, can't do that when working.

>>62103520
word

62105893
>>62102144
Capitalism/materialism has driven people insane and now every relationship has to be transactional. I mean don't get played but have a heart.

62105979
>>62102068
I've been NEETing for 10 months and traveling the world with my gf. I think that puts me at the tippy top.

Of course I still have routines to keep my body/mind in shape. Everyday I hit the gym, play chess, and keep my Spanish streak going on Duolingo.

62106085
What about wfh virgin?

62106151
Gibsmaxxed, deliver pizza three days a week while the government pays my mortgage, putting $300/week into my retirement account.

62106211
>>62105893
> I mean don't get played but have a heart.
How, bro? Pretend I am rich, what can a girl offer me I cannot buy? While my wealth keeps growing, her looks keep fading.

62106217
>>62105893
You are pretty much telling a high value male to pretend he has no value. Why don’t you tell every girl to pretend she is ugly and deformed?
Stupid.

62106225
>>62106085
>What about wfh virgin?
Above pussyfree wagie, but below sexful middle-management cuck

62106262
>>62102165
>>62102594
>>62102119
Dude waging eats at you
Six months into my job I realized I became a husk that only has enough energy to go back to work. All my goals, dreams, personality traits just became grey goop. I am happy that after gooning so much I received a post nut clarity so powerful that it reminded me of what the fuck I started this job for.

62106634
>>62102068
Cringe, if you are not doing the needful for the betterment of your nation state you are an embarrassment

62106637
>>62106225
how much money do I need to be able to own something like that?

62110598
>>62103520
is it neetdom if youre trying to make money but it doesnt pop off too much but trickles in a grand or so sometimes not really but backed by millions in asset allocation?

asking for a fren of course.

62110618
Knew a guy who between the ages of 23 and 35 just didn't work, fucked a new girl every week, those same girls drove him around places (he didn't have a car, didn't need one being driven around for free), gave him money and bought him things. He stayed at their place half of the week, the other half he didn't so that he could go fuck some other girls.
He had a natural talent that isn't replicable if you aren't born with it.
Women gravitated to him and no amount of money, confidence, PUA shit, "game", looksmaxxing zoomer fag shit, will ever come close to this natural ability.

62110649
>>62106225
I wanna lick her back muscles, does that makes me gay?

62110662
im a househusband and my wife is about to go to work

62111013
Been NEETing for a few months with very occasional work. Got an interview for a full time job on Wednesday and I think I have a good chance of getting it but I am not excited. I hate spending the majority of my day at work or travelling to/from work. It is actual bullshit.

But I don't want to move back with parents it's just gay.

It's all so fucking gay.

62111044
>>62102119
I was too badly abused for too long by corporations and businesses/customers. I doubt I will ever be the same. I fucking hate humanity now, like genuinely; I wouldn’t fuck to save the species and if given a button to wipe humanity from the earth and let the animals have it, I would press the button instantly.

62111048
>>62110662
Enjoy your upcoming divorce. Hopefully you get a decent payout.

item.title: So, now that assblaster was confirmed controlled opposition, and LINK holders have become "the Cuckolds of Crypto"... — 85 replies — 33.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
So, now that assblaster was confirmed controlled opposition, and LINK holders have become "the Cuckolds of Crypto"...

Open thread • Replies: 85 • Updated: 2026-04-13 11:48 UTC

OP

So, now that assblaster was confirmed controlled opposition, and LINK holders have become "the Cuckolds of Crypto"... shouldn't we have a look at what he told us *not* to buy?

He tried very hard to steer us away from one coin in particular back in 2018.

They wanted you out.

Early replies (first 3)

62077049
well he was right about raiblocks

62077089
>>62077049
Only in the sense that he was "right" about LINK. It's price did go up, yet it achieved nothing. Sergey met Trump and still nobody cares about smartcontracts. LINK had every chance to succeed but failed.

>Controlled opposition is a political or strategic tactic where a governing body, organization, or elite group secretly supports, infiltrates, or manages its own opposition to manipulate dissent, control narratives, and prevent real challenges to the status quo

A functional stateless currency would challenge the status quo, and now it's been "over 5 years under the radar".

Watch how long this thread stays up.

62077098
>>62077000
>>62077049
>>62077089
Bullish for XRP

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62093751
>>62087403
shut up stinkbag
you lost the game of life

62095975
>>62078703
>a singular tree

62100199
cuckolds!

62100381
>>62077089
Link is still like 7% inflation.
We still got a few years for "cheapies"
Lines right up with economic collapse time-frames tho.

62100386
>>62100381
Thought experiment:

What would happen to the price of nano if the inventor of nano shook the US President's hand?

That is why they wanted you to buy LINK instead

62100392
>>62100381
>Link is still like 7% inflation.
Bitcoin had triple digit inflation when it pumped the hardest.
ETH had 10% inflation when it pumped the hardest.
Solana had over 500% inflation when it pumped the hardest.

If you want to go more recent:
Sui had 200% inflation when it pumped the hardest.
Hyperliquid had 25% inflation when it pumped from rank 200+ to rank 10.

Stop being this fucking stupid.

62100973
>>62100386
>What would happen to the price of nano if the inventor of nano shook the US President's hand?


you sound like a boomer yelling at the sky
how does running up to a podium and shaking the hand of the least credible president in the united states' 250 year history accrue value to you a funding altcoin

62101022
>>62100392

so your logic is that because the top few crypto assets with mass appeal pumped x amount despite inflationary tokenomics, that means your funding coin should too?

let me state the obvious which is that there isn't enough liquidity for this happen across 30 million altcoins

should the rocks in my backyard also pump in value because gold went up?
should houses in the trailer park also pump the same as waterfront mansions because real estate went up?
should you get laid more because more women are becoming whores?

62101041
>>62100381
I’ve noticed Sergey tends to drop news when there is very bearish things happening in the world. Everything about this project seems like it wants as few eyes on it as possible. Very strange.

62101064
>>62101022
HUBRIS

62101272
>>62100973
Because my altcoin actually threatens the system

Yours is token not needed

62102231
>>62077000
So, now that OP is confirmed opposition, time to remind him: the pool is closed.

62102327
>>62077784
Revenue streams will multiple by orders of magnitude over the next few years. Price will follow naturally.

62103489
>>62101022
I didn't claim inflation means it should pump. How fucking dumb are you.

62104109
>>62103489
>comparing POW to market selling on a CEX
>comparing a supply of 21 million to 1 fucking billion
>unable to comprehend that inflation is a death spiral when there are 0 incentives to create buying pressure
seriously, how fucking dumb are you to even use this shitty argument in 2017+9

62104717
>>62104109
>>comparing POW to market selling on a CEX
Only two out of five in my list are PoW.

>>comparing a supply of 21 million to 1 fucking billion
I'm comparing percentages.

You're literally subsaharan IQ tier.

62104804
>>62103489
>I didn't claim inflation means it should pump.

you insinuated that the market wasn't "fair" because those coins pumped and yours didn't

62104808
Adem was right.
Adem won

62104969
>>62104804
I insinuated that it's retarded to blame inflation for Link not pumping when pretty much everything that did pump had higher inflation.

62105435
>>62077423
kekin

62105506
BOOOOOOOOOOOM

62105533
>>62083016
> why exactly did this site die off so quickly

Glowies deployed pic rel and won

62105587
>>62077000
XRP SUCKS and you know it, Jabroni!

62106385
>>62105587
XRB not XRP

62106404
>>62104969
and you're unbelievably retarded for picking 5 outliers with extraordinary circumstances out of 30 million crypto shitcoins
fuck off and die you gaslighting cunt

62106430
>>62106404
THANK YOU
god am i so sick of stinks
EVERY TIME A STINK OPENS HIS MOUTH IM LIKE SHUT THE FUCK UUUUUUUP

62106440
>>62106404
>outliers
Add BNB, XRP, and Tron and it's the entire top 10.

And why do you keep replying with a different ID?

62108165
>>62104969
>I insinuated that it's retarded to blame inflation for Link not pumping when pretty much everything that did pump had higher inflation

yes i understand what you said but you don't appear to. you don't have as many buyers as btc, eth, sol... so yes buddy inflation does matter

link holders are like children yelling to their parents about how life isn't fair. as if there's some unwritten rule that markets have to be fair, and if you debate hard enough you'll convince the market it's wrong and finally have some gains


it's like a kid on a high school basketball team arguing with the coach about fundamentals because he's mimicking players in the nba. it's like yeah buddy lebron james can get away with doing xyz because he's a gifted athlete hall of famer. you on the other hand are a bum who can't touch the rim, so just stfu and listen to the coach.

that analogy is basically btc and other large coins versus link. when you're a piece of shit coin with the ugliest nastiest group of losers in the world as your holders, everything matters.

62108734
>>62108165
Is this supposed to be a bit?
I checked and this doesn't seem to be a copypasta.

62110579
BOOOOOOOOOOOM

item.title: No really, why aren't you all in on AI? — 43 replies — 21.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
No really, why aren't you all in on AI?

Open thread • Replies: 43 • Updated: 2026-04-13 12:23 UTC

OP

Teachers won't exist in 10 years
90% of jobs can be automated
It will solve cancer.
It will solve climate change
Your children will not work a 9-5
Human intelligence will be worthless
Spelling, curvsive and on will be worthless
You will know everything.
Colleges won't exist.
Every movie will use some form of ai
Everyone will have a literal superior 24/7 therapist for 100 outs a year
Fusion energy will be solved.
We will live longer
You WILL probably be unemployed in 5 years.

Are you getting it through your skull yet? You will not be living in the same world.

Invest literally ever penny now, retard. Stop being dense and contrarian.

Early replies (first 3)

62108184
>>62108143
It's a bubble.

62108199
It's a gimmick and has fallen flat on its face in every business I've seen try implement it (I worked with them). An expensive write off for companies that have fallen for the hype.

62108229
>>62108184
>>62108199
Are you seriously low IQ or something?

We literally won't have boomer ideology wars anymore. The same therapist ais can be used to "translate" the other side as it "gets" both sides more than they get themselves through superior pattern recognition.

Yes. I'll say it: AI will end the culture wars. Have a conversation about why liberals "do" something right now and you will get it. Mankind's greatest invention is here.

I'll say it again:
Mankind's greatest invention is here.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62108894
>>62108880
tons of small colleges close every year. some of it may be online classes at larger better known schools.

62108903
>>62108892
you do literally live under a rock. SWE dont code manually anymore.

62108909
>>62108903
You're not listening so why even pretend to have a discussion

62108917
>>62108143
>Teachers won't exist in 10 years
Teachers are like the last job that will go away nigga, they literally exist so parents can send their kids to fuck off somewhere while they go to work. They're glorified kindergarten caretakers that may or may not teach the little shits to read in the meantime. Like even shilling AI to death that's the job that doesn't stop existing.

62108925
>>62108267
>>62108789
Dude, Churches are going to replace musicians for 100/mo ai music.

There will be two types of people: Those who got AI and those who didn't

62108937
>>62108143
>its gonna solve all the problems so much that..... you need a 24/7 therapist?

62108944
>>62108909
non coder =/= SWE

>Show me a job ai made easier
clown. stay under your rock lol.

62108947
>>62108143
>and video games will become more realistic

62108952
>>62108925
Nobody is going to spend $100 per month to generate AI slop church music.

62109012
>>62108952
No one's going to pay 800 per musician when you can make top tier church music for 100 a month

62109021
>>62109012
No, they are going to continue paying $10 per month or less to stream it. Or they will use CDs or other digital methods. If you are implying AI slop will replace live musicians you are severely delusional. People pay for live musicians because they want a human being there playing music. AI musicians are equivalent to streaming from spotify, except it sucks ass.

62109023
>>62108143
>Your children will not work a 9-5
You're right everyone will be doordash drivers since there won't be jobs.

62109045
>>62109021
..Anonymous (ID: Jc00+4Eg)
04/12/26(Sun)19:24:55 No.62109021
>>62109012 #
No, they are going to continue paying $10 per month or less to stream it. Or they will use CDs or other digital methods. If you are implying AI slop will replace live musicians you are severely delusional. People pay for live musicians because they want a human being there playing music. AI musicians are equivalent to streaming from spotify, except it sucks ass.

No because you're not already paying for for it. Your ai bill will be your new phone and electricity bill.

62109053
>>62109045
If you're implying we will essentially be forced to pay for AI slop because it will replace the availability of other services, I agree that is possible. However that is a completely different argument to what you've been spouting thus far. You haven't responded to anything I said, you've just changed to a different and much more speculative argument. Pathetic.

62109068
>>62108143
Let me know when AI can get a NEET off video games and into a job.

62109080
>>62108229
>We literally won't have boomer ideology wars anymore
Let me know when AI has achieved peace in the Middle East.

62109088
>>62108917
Let me know when AI can provide pre-school child care.

This is important. All the existing day care workers are immigrants who will be deported.

62109091
>>62109012
Wanna know how we know you've never been to church?

62109123
>>62108143
Because the only type of "AI" they're working on right now is LLM tech. AI is way more than just annoying chatbots. Until they start funding more fields of AI research I am simply not interested in this gay techbro clown show (which carries the same energy as the fake and gay pandemic hysteria of 2020-2022)

62109180
>>62109053
>>62109080
>>62109091
You're going to feel so retarded in 3 years lol

62109191
>>62109180
You said the same shit 3+ years ago, and it's only gotten slightly better at coding.

62109991
>>62108143
The top is already in bro. You missed the gold rush already if you didn't start previously.

62110026
>>62108952
>>62109012
A real church would know AI is demons trapped in silicon and never use it.

62110029
>>62109991
>The top is already in bro.
These are the very earliest days of AI. This is like investing in car makers in 1920.

62110088
>>62108143
How to go all in on AI

62110177
>>62110088
dis.
in crypto

62110474
>>62108229
Do you expect biztards and 4chantards to believe you? They have to cope because they don't have the imagination to see such a scenario come true. And its exactly why billionaires will win in the end, because the average normal guy is so fucking stupid that they can't see what's in front of them.

62110508
>>62110474
I've quite literally seen it fail in front of me, in a professional environment, not based on 4chins hopes and copes or whatever they have heard from twitter.
biztrards live in fantasy land where they tug their cocks to syknet becoming real.

62110520
>>62109088
Then they will still exist because in case you misread me, teachers are not important for teaching anymore, they're there so the parents can send the child to fuck off somewhere while they do their 8 hour shifts. They're kindgarteners. The AI teaching everything to the children is meaningless, you think with how many functionally illiterate retards that school has any purpose but to be the legal responsible of the kids? Like migrants can get deported but then you'll need to replace them with the local stock, (which is based, but beside the point). The day women are expelled from their jewish daycare jobs and get back to raising children so on average a parent is free MAYBE what you're saying may become true. Maybe.

62110656
>he thinks the rich once they have perfect ai slaves wont cull 99% of humanity and leave 0.9% for rape and fun
lol

item.title: Why aren’t you holding BTC? — 92 replies — 21.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
Why aren’t you holding BTC?

Open thread • Replies: 92 • Updated: 2026-04-13 10:03 UTC

OP

If you’re still watching or waiting to buy BTC, why not do it now?
>I guess you’re wasting time, or maybe you just prefer altcoins. What’s your reason?

Early replies (first 3)

62087977
>>62087937
I only watch it to laugh at Saylor and you bitsteinbaggies. Not buying digital nothing.

62087993
>>62087937
Waiting for sub60K

62087997
>>62087937
I don't have enough money for it to make me rich. Alts have a good chance of vastly outperforming BTC during the next big pump. I've decided to take the potential for a 10x over the guarantee of a 2x.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62101365
>>62091723
that’s basically how all markets work when you think about it.

62102223
>>62100192
Ledger is cool

62102233
>>62100530
Wtf is that

62102249
>>62101348
I see aave v3 is better

62102256
>>62100233
Shylink shitlink

62102324
>>62102223
Yeah and being able to interact with DeFi there with millions of users while keeping self custody makes everything feel a lot safer and more seamless.

62102341
>>62091734
You should have ordered healthy foodies kek

62102346
>>62102233
a teenager

62102364
>>62102249
V3 is solid. V4 just went live a few weeks ago. Deposits are still ramping up. Kinda pointless comparing that to years of development. Give it time anon.

62102377
>>62095458
reread it anon

62102716
>>62087997
I made this same mistake in the last cycle. Trust me, all the liquidity will go into BTC, so it's better to buy and keep it on TBVs for yield instead of going for alts

62103228
>>62097432
The smuggest are newfags because they're trying to build their own conviction by mimicking the toxic maximalsm during the fork wars. The oldfags have either all left or have the ability to laugh at one's own expense. Bitcoin still hasn't done anything meaningful and "orange pilling" your retarded friends doesn't help. I consider myself a closet maxi because I do believe in bitcoin but I'd never associate with them or go to a meetup/conference.

62103805
>>62095600
For many bullish reasons

62103981
>>62095620
And are you expecting what then?

62105081
>>62100014
Depends on your goal.

62105096
I DCA into Bitcoin. It can either go up or it can either go down. I'd rather take my chances than holding gold for 30 years for a +1k profit

62106216
>>62095867
Which 'obvious' shift?

62106279
>>62106216
Its quite obvious desu

62106298
btc is going to 20k if not lower

>>62097398
>'good alts' will vastly outperform
have you been asleep for 5 years?

there was like 3 alts that outperformed btc out of literally millions. your odds are terrible for alts, much better chance to just throw it all on red and call it a day

62106312
>>62106298
>btc is going to 20k if not lower
>there was like 3 alts that outperformed btc out of literally millions
Bottom signal, the retards maxxing are back

62106435
>>62106298
Idiot

62106463
>>62097125
DCA doesn't work you stupid nigger. Just look at Michael Saylor, he's down -5% after SIX YEARS of dollar cost averaging

62107082
>>62106463

ngmi

You're not smart enough.

62108172
>>62095759
Why do you say that?

62109768
>>62097398
Sure, chase “good alts”… just don’t cry in a few years when they roundtrip to zero and BTC is sitting way higher.

You’ll wish you just held the hardest asset instead of playing ETF cosplay.

62110223
Guarantee 30% return on semiconductors and useless AI tech or gamble that Bitcoin crawls back to 100k any time soon despite losing 40% of it's value in the last few months. Hmmmm

62110242
I expected that until December Bitcoin will sunk to below 40k and Solana will be around $20. I will buy solana and Hold it until 2029 when the next bullrun will start.

2027-2028 will be crab market, everyone will say that crypto is dead just like 2023.

I will buy SOL because it will probably 20x while BTC will only 5x.

62110338
>>62102233
A 17 year old in the prime of their life.

62110351
>>62110338
Fact, can't wait to back kick some zombies

62110380
>>62087937
Why aren't you holding nano?

It literally has perfected digital money.

>I guess you’re wasting time, or maybe you just prefer inferior coins. What’s your reason?
